questions.question: Photography ka basic principle kya hai?

options.A: Light ko record karna

questions.explanation: Photography ka matlab hi hai light se drawing karna, yaani light ko record karke image banana.

questions.question: DSLR ka full form kya hai?

options.A: Digital Single Lens Reflex

questions.explanation: DSLR ka pura naam Digital Single Lens Reflex hai, jo iske working mechanism ko explain karta hai.

questions.question: Mobile camera aur DSLR camera mein sabse bada structural difference kya hai?

options.A: DSLR mein interchangeable lenses hote hain, mobile mein fixed.
options.B: Mobile camera mein flash hota hai, DSLR mein nahi.
options.C: DSLR mein battery nahi hoti, mobile mein hoti hai.
options.D: Mobile camera mein sensor bada hota hai, DSLR mein chhota.

questions.explanation: DSLR ki ek major pehchan uske interchangeable lenses hain, jabki mobile cameras mein lenses built-in aur fixed hote hain.

questions.question: Ek photography job ke liye, product photography mein kaunsa camera type zyada preferred hoga?

options.A: DSLR (with macro lens)

questions.explanation: Product photography ke liye high detail, control aur specific lenses (jaise macro) ki zaroorat hoti hai, jo DSLR provide karta hai.

questions.question: Camera ka kaunsa part light ko gather karke sensor tak pahunchata hai?

options.A: Lens

questions.explanation: Lens hi woh component hai jo light ko collect aur focus karke camera sensor par project karta hai.

questions.question: Megapixel (MP) kis cheez ko represent karta hai?

options.A: Image ka file size

questions.explanation: Megapixel image ki resolution ko batata hai, yaani kitne millions of pixels se image bani hai.

questions.question: Event photography ke liye, kaunsa camera mode sabse flexible control deta hai?

options.A: Manual Mode

questions.explanation: Manual mode photographer ko shutter speed, aperture, aur ISO par complete control deta hai, jo dynamic event photography ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko ek moving subject ki clear photo leni hai, toh aap kya ensure karenge?

options.A: Fast shutter speed

questions.explanation: Moving subject ko freeze karne ke liye fast shutter speed zaroori hai, taaki motion blur na aaye.

questions.question: Jab aap ek professional portrait shoot kar rahe hain, toh aapke liye sabse important kya hoga?

options.A: Subject par sharp focus

questions.explanation: Portrait photography mein subject par sharp focus hona sabse important hai, taaki viewer ka attention subject par rahe.

questions.question: Image stabilization ka primary purpose kya hai?

options.A: Camera shake se hone wale blur ko kam karna

questions.explanation: Image stabilization camera shake ke karan hone wale blur ko minimize karta hai, especially low light ya telephoto shots mein.

questions.question: Agar aap ek real estate client ke liye interior photos le rahe hain, toh aapko kis cheez ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Room ki lighting aur perspective ko accurate dikhana
options.C: Photos ko black & white mein lena
options.D: Har photo mein photographer ko dikhana

questions.explanation: Real estate photography mein room ki spaciousness, lighting aur overall look ko accurately represent karna important hai.

questions.question: Ek wedding photographer ke liye, kaunsa feature sabse helpful hoga jab low light mein ceremony ho?

options.A: High ISO performance aur fast autofocus

questions.explanation: Wedding ceremony mein low light conditions common hoti hain, jahan high ISO performance noise ko control karta hai aur fast autofocus sharp images ensure karta hai moving subjects par.

questions.question: Jab aap kisi product ki commercial photo shoot kar rahe hain, toh aapko kya avoid karna chahiye?

options.A: Product par harsh shadows ya reflections

questions.explanation: Commercial product photography mein product ko best light mein dikhana hota hai, isliye harsh shadows aur unwanted reflections avoid kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Mirrorless cameras, DSLRs se kaise different hain?

options.A: Mirrorless mein mirror aur optical viewfinder nahi hota
options.B: Mirrorless mein lenses interchangeable nahi hote
options.C: Mirrorless sirf video record karte hain

questions.explanation: Mirrorless cameras mein DSLR ki tarah mirror mechanism aur optical viewfinder nahi hote, jisse wo compact hote hain.

questions.question: Ek food blogger ke liye, food photography mein kis cheez par focus karna chahiye?

options.A: Food ki freshness aur texture ko highlight karna

questions.explanation: Food photography mein food ki appeal, texture, aur natural presentation sabse important hai, jiske liye sahi lighting, focus aur composition zaroori hai.

questions.question: Ek wildlife photographer ko long distance shots ke liye kis type ke lens ki zaroorat padegi?

options.A: Telephoto lens

questions.explanation: Wildlife photography mein animals se safe distance maintain karte hue unki photos lene ke liye telephoto lenses use kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Camera ka sensor kis cheez ke liye responsible hota hai?

options.A: Light ko capture karke digital image banana

questions.explanation: Sensor camera ka brain hai jo light ko receive karke use digital information mein convert karta hai, jisse image banti hai.

questions.question: Aperture ko kis unit mein measure kiya jaata hai?

options.A: f-stops

questions.explanation: Aperture ko f-stops (jaise f/2.8, f/8) mein measure kiya jaata hai, jo lens ke opening size ko batate hain.

questions.question: Agar aapko shallow depth of field chahiye (background blur karna hai), toh aap aperture ko kya set karenge?

options.A: Wide aperture (chhota f-number, jaise f/2.8)
options.D: Aperture ka depth of field se koi relation nahi

questions.explanation: Chhota f-number (wide aperture) zyada light allow karta hai aur shallow depth of field create karta hai, jisse background blur hota hai.

questions.question: Shutter speed kis cheez ko control karta hai?

options.A: Kitni der tak sensor par light padegi

questions.explanation: Shutter speed woh time duration hai jiske liye camera ka shutter open rehta hai, aur light sensor tak pahunchti hai.

questions.question: Ek waterfall ko silky smooth dikhane ke liye, aap shutter speed ko kya set karenge?

options.A: Slow shutter speed (e.g., 1/2 second)
options.D: Shutter speed ka isse koi lena dena nahi

questions.explanation: Slow shutter speed moving water ko blur karta hai, jisse silky smooth effect aata hai.

questions.question: ISO kya measure karta hai?

options.A: Sensor ki light sensitivity

questions.explanation: ISO sensor ki light sensitivity ko measure karta hai. Higher ISO matlab zyada sensitive.

questions.question: Low light conditions mein, agar aapko flash use nahi karna hai, toh aap kya adjust karenge taaki photo bright aaye?

options.A: ISO value badhaenge

questions.explanation: Low light mein, flash avoid karte hue, higher ISO setting sensor ko zyada sensitive banati hai light ke prati, jisse photo bright hoti hai.

questions.question: High ISO settings ka ek major drawback kya hai?

options.A: Image mein 'noise' ya grain ka aana
options.B: Image ka colour change ho jaana

questions.explanation: High ISO se sensor ki sensitivity badhti hai, lekin uske saath image mein digital 'noise' ya grain bhi badh jaata hai.

questions.question: Exposure Triangle ke teen elements kaunse hain?

options.A: Aperture, Shutter Speed, ISO

questions.explanation: Exposure Triangle ke teen pillars Aperture, Shutter Speed, aur ISO hain, jo milkar image ki brightness ko control karte hain.

questions.question: Agar aapki photo 'overexposed' ho gayi hai, toh uska kya matlab hai?

options.A: Photo bahut zyada bright hai

questions.explanation: Overexposed photo ka matlab hai ki sensor par bahut zyada light padi hai, jisse photo excessively bright ho gayi hai aur details lost ho gayi hain.

questions.question: White Balance ka kya kaam hai?

options.A: Image mein colours ko natural dikhana, light source ke according
options.B: Image ko black & white mein convert karna

questions.explanation: White Balance camera ko batata hai ki 'white' kya hai, jisse different light sources (sunlight, fluorescent, tungsten) ke under colours natural dikhe.

questions.question: Sunny outdoor conditions mein, aapko generally kaunsa ISO value use karna chahiye?

options.A: Low ISO (e.g., 100 or 200)
options.D: ISO ka sunlight se koi relation nahi

questions.explanation: Bright sunny conditions mein bahut light hoti hai, isliye low ISO use karte hain taaki noise kam se kam ho aur quality best ho.

questions.question: Metering mode 'Spot Metering' kab useful hota hai?

options.A: Jab aapko frame ke ek bahut chhote area ki exact exposure chahiye
options.B: Jab aapko pure frame ki average exposure chahiye
options.C: Jab aapko fast shutter speed chahiye

questions.explanation: Spot metering camera ko frame ke ek specific, chhote spot par exposure measure karne deta hai, jo challenging lighting situations mein precise exposure ke liye useful hai.

questions.question: Bade f-number (jaise f/22) ka kya effect hota hai?

options.A: Deep depth of field (zyada area in focus)
options.C: Zyada light sensor tak pahunchti hai

questions.explanation: Bada f-number (narrow aperture) kam light allow karta hai aur deep depth of field create karta hai, jisse foreground aur background dono sharp hote hain.

questions.question: Ek sports photographer ko action freeze karne ke liye, shutter speed kitna hona chahiye?

options.A: Extremely fast (e.g., 1/1000s or faster)
options.D: Shutter speed ka action se koi relation nahi

questions.explanation: Sports photography mein fast-moving subjects ko freeze karne ke liye bahut fast shutter speed ki zaroorat hoti hai, taaki koi motion blur na ho.

questions.question: Agar aap Portrait Mode mein shoot kar rahe hain, toh camera automatically kya adjust karta hai?

options.A: Wide aperture (background blur ke liye)
options.B: Fast shutter speed (action freeze ke liye)
options.D: Narrow aperture (deep depth of field ke liye)

questions.explanation: Portrait Mode ka primary goal subject ko highlight karna hai, jiske liye camera automatically wide aperture set karta hai taaki background blur ho jaaye.

questions.question: ISO 400 aur ISO 800 mein kya difference hai?

options.A: ISO 800 par sensor ISO 400 se doguna zyada sensitive hai light ke prati
options.B: ISO 400 par sensor ISO 800 se doguna zyada sensitive hai light ke prati
options.C: Dono mein koi sensitivity difference nahi
options.D: ISO 400 sirf colour photos ke liye hai, ISO 800 black & white ke liye

questions.explanation: ISO values doubling har stop par light sensitivity ko double karta hai. Toh ISO 800, ISO 400 se double sensitive hai.

questions.question: Ek photography assignment jismein aapko ek badi building ko poori sharpness ke saath capture karna hai, toh aap kaunsi setting prefer karenge?

options.A: Narrow aperture (bada f-number) aur tripod
options.C: High ISO aur fast shutter speed

questions.explanation: Badi building ko poori sharpness ke saath capture karne ke liye deep depth of field (narrow aperture) zaroori hai. Tripod camera shake avoid karta hai, especially slow shutter speed par jo narrow aperture ke saath required ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Rule of Thirds mein, subject ko frame ke kis area mein place karna chahiye?

options.A: Grid lines ke intersections par

questions.explanation: Rule of Thirds ke according, subject ko grid lines ke intersections par rakhne se photo zyada balanced aur visually appealing lagti hai.

questions.question: Leading Lines ka kya purpose hota hai composition mein?

options.A: Viewer ki aankhon ko subject ki taraf guide karna

questions.explanation: Leading lines (jaise roads, fences) viewer ki aankhon ko photo ke main subject ya focal point ki taraf guide karte hain.

questions.question: Agar aap ek street photographer hain, toh aap 'Candid Photography' ke liye kya prefer karenge?

options.A: People ko unke natural actions mein capture karna, bina unhe pata chale
options.B: People ko pose karwake photo lena

questions.explanation: Candid photography mein subjects ko unke natural, unposed moments mein capture kiya jaata hai, jo street photography ka ek hallmark hai.

questions.question: Symmetry composition mein kya role play karti hai?

options.A: Balance aur harmony create karna

questions.explanation: Symmetry (jaise reflections ya identical patterns) photo mein balance, order, aur harmony ki feeling deti hai.

questions.question: Negative Space ka kya matlab hai composition mein?

options.A: Subject ke aas-paas ka empty area

questions.explanation: Negative space subject ke aas-paas ka woh empty area hai jo subject ko stand out karne mein help karta hai aur composition ko clean rakhta hai.

questions.question: Ek low-angle shot ka kya effect hota hai?

options.A: Subject ko powerful ya dominant dikhana
options.B: Subject ko chhota aur kamzor dikhana

questions.explanation: Low-angle shot, jismein camera subject ke neeche se shoot karta hai, subject ko bada, powerful, ya dominant dikhata hai.

questions.question: Fill the Frame composition technique ka kya goal hai?

options.A: Subject ko frame mein poora bhar dena, distractions minimize karna
options.B: Bahut saare elements ko frame mein include karna

questions.explanation: Fill the Frame ka matlab hai subject ko frame mein itna bada dikhana ki woh poora frame occupy kar le, jisse background distractions minimize ho jaati hain.

questions.question: Aap ek wedding photographer hain aur aapko bride ki dress ki details capture karni hain. Kis composition technique ka use karenge?

options.A: Fill the Frame aur close-up

questions.explanation: Details capture karne ke liye 'Fill the Frame' aur close-up shots sabse effective hote hain, jisse viewers dress ki intricate details dekh paate hain.

questions.question: Natural Framing ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Photo ke andar naturally existing elements (jaise darwaza, khidki) se frame banana
options.B: Photo ko software se frame karna
options.C: Photo ko physical frame mein lagana
options.D: Sirf landscape photos mein use hota hai

questions.explanation: Natural framing mein hum photo ke andar hi existing elements (jaise trees, arches) ka use karte hain subject ko frame karne ke liye.

questions.question: Golden Ratio (Phi) composition mein kaise help karta hai?

options.A: Visually pleasing aur balanced compositions create karne mein
options.B: Photos ko randomly compose karne mein
options.D: Sirf abstract art mein use hota hai

questions.explanation: Golden Ratio ek mathematical concept hai jo visually pleasing proportions aur compositions banane mein madad karta hai, jo Rule of Thirds se bhi advanced hai.

questions.question: Jab aap ek travel photographer hain aur aapko ek bade se pahad ki photo leni hai, toh aap kaunsa composition element use karenge taaki pahad ki grandeur dikhe?

options.A: Small human element ko foreground mein rakhna

questions.explanation: Ek chhota human element foreground mein rakhne se viewers ko pahad ke scale aur grandeur ka idea lagta hai, jisse photo zyada impactful banti hai.

questions.question: Headroom aur Lead Room ka kya significance hai portrait photography mein?

options.A: Headroom subject ke upar ka space hai, Lead Room subject ke movement direction mein space
options.C: Dono sirf landscape photography mein use hote hain
options.D: Inka composition se koi lena dena nahi

questions.explanation: Headroom subject ke sir ke upar ka space hota hai, jabki Lead Room subject jis direction mein dekh raha hai ya move kar raha hai us direction mein diya gaya space hota hai, jo photo ko balanced banata hai.

questions.question: Bokeh effect composition mein kya contribute karta hai?

options.A: Subject ko background se alag karna aur focus highlight karna

questions.explanation: Bokeh effect, jo background blur hota hai, subject ko background se alag karta hai aur viewer ka focus subject par laata hai.

questions.question: Rule of Odds kya suggest karta hai composition mein?

options.A: Odd number mein subjects (jaise 3 ya 5) visually zyada pleasing hote hain
options.B: Even number mein subjects zyada pleasing hote hain
options.D: Subjects ki placement random honi chahiye

questions.explanation: Rule of Odds kehta hai ki jab aapke paas multiple subjects hon, toh odd number (3, 5, 7) mein hone par photo zyada aesthetically pleasing lagti hai.

questions.question: Ek product photographer ko apne product ki photo mein kya avoid karna chahiye, composition ke hisaab se?

options.A: Cluttered background
options.D: Rule of Thirds ka use karna

questions.explanation: Product photography mein product ko highlight karna hota hai, isliye cluttered background se bachna chahiye taaki viewer ka focus product par hi rahe.

questions.question: Depth ka illusion create karne ke liye composition mein kaunsi technique use hoti hai?

options.A: Foreground, Middleground, Background elements ko layer karna
options.C: Sirf ek hi plane par focus karna

questions.explanation: Foreground, middleground, aur background mein elements ko strategically place karne se photo mein depth ka illusion create hota hai, jisse photo 3D feel deti hai.

questions.question: Ek photojournalism assignment mein, aapko ek incident ko capture karna hai. Kis composition rule ko aap follow karenge?

options.A: Rule of Thirds aur strong visual narrative
options.C: Bokeh effect ka zyada use karna

questions.explanation: Photojournalism mein composition important hai, lekin sabse zyada important hai ek clear aur compelling visual narrative provide karna, jismein Rule of Thirds jaise basic rules helpful hote hain.

questions.question: Golden Hour kis time period ko kehte hain?

options.A: Sunrise ke baad aur Sunset se pehle ka time

questions.explanation: Golden Hour, ya Magic Hour, sunrise ke baad aur sunset se pehle ka time hota hai jab light soft, warm aur golden hoti hai, jo photography ke liye ideal hai.

questions.question: Harsh Mid-day sun mein portrait photography ke liye kya challenge hota hai?

options.A: Subject ke chehre par harsh shadows aur overexposure

questions.explanation: Mid-day sun direct aur harsh hota hai, jisse subject ke chehre par deep shadows aur highlights mein overexposure ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Reflector ka kya kaam hota hai photography mein?

options.A: Light ko subject par bounce karna aur shadows ko fill karna

questions.explanation: Reflector ek surface hoti hai jo light ko bounce karke subject par direct karti hai, jisse shadows soft hote hain aur subject evenly lit hota hai.

questions.question: Fill Flash ka kya purpose hai?

options.A: Daylight mein subject par padne wali harsh shadows ko kam karna
options.B: Pure scene ko flash se light karna
options.C: Raat mein long exposure shots lena

questions.explanation: Fill flash ka use tab kiya jaata hai jab ambient light sufficient ho, lekin subject par kuch shadows hon. Flash un shadows ko 'fill' karta hai, unhe soft banata hai.

questions.question: Soft light aur Hard light mein kya difference hai?

options.A: Soft light diffused aur shadows soft karti hai, Hard light direct aur shadows sharp karti hai
options.B: Soft light sirf indoor mein hoti hai, Hard light outdoor mein
options.C: Soft light colourless hoti hai, Hard light colourful

questions.explanation: Soft light diffused hoti hai (jaise cloudy din mein), jisse shadows soft aur gradual hote hain. Hard light direct hoti hai (jaise mid-day sun), jisse shadows sharp aur defined hote hain.

questions.question: Backlight mein photography karte samay kya challenge aata hai?

options.A: Subject underexposed ho sakta hai, ya silhouette ban sakta hai

questions.explanation: Backlight mein light subject ke peeche se aati hai, jisse subject underexposed ho sakta hai aur ek silhouette effect create ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Diffuser ka kya use hai flash photography mein?

options.A: Flash ki light ko soft aur evenly spread karna
options.B: Flash ki light ko concentrate karna

questions.explanation: Diffuser flash ki harsh, direct light ko soft aur evenly distributed light mein convert karta hai, jisse shadows kam harsh hote hain.

questions.question: Agar aap ek product ko studio mein shoot kar rahe hain, toh aap kaunse artificial light sources prefer karenge?

options.A: Studio strobes ya continuous LED lights with softboxes

questions.explanation: Studio strobes aur continuous LED lights (softboxes ke saath) precise control aur soft, even illumination provide karte hain, jo product photography ke liye ideal hai.

questions.question: Blue Hour kis time ko kehte hain?

options.A: Sunrise se pehle aur Sunset ke baad ka time jab sky deep blue hota hai
options.C: Golden Hour ke beech ka time

questions.explanation: Blue Hour woh short period hota hai sunrise se pehle aur sunset ke baad jab suraj horizon ke neeche hota hai aur sky ek deep, rich blue color leta hai.

questions.question: Ek wedding photographer ko indoor reception mein light control ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.A: External flash unit ko bounce karna ceiling ya wall se
options.B: Sirf camera ke pop-up flash ka use karna
options.C: High ISO use karna aur flash bilkul na use karna

questions.explanation: External flash ko ceiling ya wall se bounce karne se soft, diffused light milti hai, jo direct flash se zyada flattering hoti hai aur harsh shadows ko avoid karti hai.

questions.question: Rim lighting effect kaise achieve kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Subject ke peeche se light source rakh kar
options.B: Subject ke saamne se light source rakh kar
options.C: Subject ke upar se light source rakh kar
options.D: Subject ke bagal se light source rakh kar

questions.explanation: Rim lighting tab achieve hoti hai jab light source subject ke peeche se aata hai, jisse subject ke edges par ek bright outline banti hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko ek moody aur dramatic photo chahiye, toh aap kis type ki lighting prefer karenge?

options.A: Hard, directional light

questions.explanation: Hard aur directional light strong shadows aur highlights create karti hai, jo moody aur dramatic effect ke liye ideal hai.

questions.question: Continuous lighting aur Strobe lighting mein kya difference hai?

options.A: Continuous lighting hamesha on rehti hai, Strobe lighting flash karti hai
options.B: Continuous lighting sirf video ke liye hai, Strobe sirf photo ke liye
options.D: Continuous lighting zyada power leti hai

questions.explanation: Continuous lighting hamesha on rehti hai, jisse aap light ka effect live dekh sakte hain. Strobe lighting ek brief, powerful flash produce karti hai jab shutter trigger hota hai.

questions.question: Light meter ka kya use hai?

options.A: Scene mein light ki amount measure karna taaki correct exposure set ho sake
options.B: Camera ki battery life check karna
options.C: Lens ki focal length adjust karna

questions.explanation: Light meter scene mein ambient light ko measure karta hai aur photographer ko correct aperture, shutter speed, aur ISO set karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Chhote light sources (jaise bare bulb) kaise shadows create karte hain?

options.A: Hard, sharp shadows

questions.explanation: Chhote light sources direct light emit karte hain, jisse hard aur sharp shadows bante hain.

questions.question: Bade light sources (jaise window ya softbox) kaise shadows create karte hain?

options.A: Soft, diffused shadows

questions.explanation: Bade light sources light ko spread karte hain, jisse soft aur diffused shadows bante hain.

questions.question: Ek photographer ko ek client ke liye office space ki photo leni hai. Use kis type ki lighting use karni chahiye?

options.A: Even, natural-looking ambient light, possibly with additional soft fill light

questions.explanation: Office spaces ki photography mein goal hota hai space ko bright, welcoming aur functional dikhana. Iske liye even, natural-looking light sabse best hoti hai, jismein additional soft fill light helpful ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Mobile phone camera mein grid lines ka kya use hai?

options.A: Composition (Rule of Thirds) mein help karna

questions.explanation: Grid lines Rule of Thirds jaise compositional rules ko apply karne mein help karte hain, jisse photos balanced aur aesthetically pleasing banti hain.

questions.question: Mobile phone mein 'Portrait Mode' ka primary function kya hai?

options.A: Subject ko sharp rakh kar background ko blur karna (bokeh effect)

questions.explanation: Portrait Mode software ka use karke subject ko focus mein rakhta hai aur background ko artificially blur karta hai, jo DSLR ke shallow depth of field jaisa dikhta hai.

questions.question: Mobile phone mein 'Panorama Mode' kis type ki photos lene ke liye best hai?

options.A: Wide landscapes ya large group shots

questions.explanation: Panorama Mode multiple images ko stitch karke ek wide, panoramic photo banata hai, jo landscapes aur large group shots ke liye ideal hai.

questions.question: HDR (High Dynamic Range) mode kab use karna chahiye mobile photography mein?

options.A: Jab scene mein bahut zyada contrast ho (bright highlights aur deep shadows)
options.C: Jab subject move kar raha ho
options.D: Jab aapko black & white photo chahiye

questions.explanation: HDR mode multiple exposures (underexposed, normal, overexposed) ko combine karke ek single image banata hai jismein highlights aur shadows dono mein detail hoti hai.

questions.question: Mobile phone mein 'Digital Zoom' ka kya disadvantage hai?

options.A: Image quality decrease hoti hai (pixelation)

questions.explanation: Digital zoom basically image ko crop aur enlarge karta hai, jisse pixels stretch hote hain aur image quality (sharpness aur detail) mein kami aati hai.

questions.question: Ek mobile photographer ko low light mein sharp photos lene ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Tripod use karna aur Night Mode ka use karna

questions.explanation: Low light mein phone ko stable rakhne ke liye tripod aur Night Mode ka use karne se camera zyada light capture kar pata hai aur sharp images milti hain.

questions.question: External mobile phone lenses (jaise wide-angle, macro) ka kya benefit hai?

options.A: Mobile camera ki versatility badhana

questions.explanation: External lenses mobile phone cameras ko alag-alag perspectives (wide, close-up) mein shoot karne ki ability dete hain, jisse unki versatility badhti hai.

questions.question: Ek food blogger mobile phone se restaurant ke dish ki photo le raha hai. Kis cheez ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Natural light ka use karna aur dish ko attractive angle se capture karna

questions.explanation: Food photography mein natural light aur appealing angles dish ki freshness aur texture ko highlight karte hain.

questions.question: Mobile phone camera ke lens ko regularly clean karna kyun important hai?

options.A: Photos ko sharp aur clear rakhne ke liye
options.B: Phone ki speed badhane ke liye
options.C: Battery ko overheat hone se bachane ke liye
options.D: Apps ko smoothly run karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Lens par dhool ya smudges hone se photos blur aur dull ho sakti hain, isliye clean lens sharp images ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Time-lapse video kaise banate hain mobile phone mein?

options.A: Long period mein regularly interval par photos le kar unhe combine karna

questions.explanation: Time-lapse mein camera ek long period mein fixed intervals par photos leta hai, jinhe baad mein ek video mein combine kiya jaata hai, jisse slow changes fast dikhte hain.

questions.question: Mobile photography mein 'Optical Image Stabilization' (OIS) ka kya benefit hai?

options.A: Physical lens movement se camera shake ko compensate karna

questions.explanation: OIS lens elements ko physically move karke camera shake ko compensate karta hai, jisse low light aur handheld shots mein sharpness improve hoti hai.

questions.question: Ek social media manager ko product launch ke liye quick, engaging photos chahiye. Mobile phone se shoot karte samay kya dhyaan rakhenge?

options.A: Good lighting, clear focus, aur creative angles
options.C: Har photo mein digital zoom karna

questions.explanation: Social media ke liye engaging content mein good lighting, clear focus aur creative angles bahut important hain, taaki product attractive lage.

questions.question: Mobile phone mein 'Pro Mode' ya 'Manual Mode' ka kya advantage hai?

options.A: Exposure settings (ISO, Shutter Speed, White Balance) par manual control

questions.explanation: Pro Mode users ko DSLR ki tarah ISO, Shutter Speed, White Balance, aur Focus par manual control deta hai, jisse creative flexibility badhti hai.

questions.question: Ek travel vlogger ko apne mobile phone se high-quality footage capture karna hai. Kya use karna chahiye?

options.A: Gimbal ya stabilizer

questions.explanation: Gimbal ya stabilizer mobile footage ko smooth aur shake-free banata hai, jo professional-looking travel vlogs ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Mobile phone mein 'Burst Mode' kab useful hota hai?

options.A: Fast-moving subjects ko capture karne ke liye
options.B: Long exposure shots lene ke liye

questions.explanation: Burst Mode ek saath kai photos leta hai, jisse aap fast-moving subjects ke best moment ko capture kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Agar aapko mobile phone se ek client ke liye architectural photos leni hain, toh kya challenge ho sakta hai?

options.A: Lens distortion (especially wide-angle lenses par) aur limited manual control

questions.explanation: Mobile phone ke wide-angle lenses mein distortion common hai, jo architectural lines ko bend kar sakta hai. Limited manual control bhi precise architectural shots ke liye challenge ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Post-processing mein 'Cropping' ka kya use hai?

options.A: Image se unwanted areas ko remove karna aur composition improve karna

questions.explanation: Cropping se aap image ke unwanted parts ko hata sakte hain aur composition ko strengthen kar sakte hain.

questions.question: JPEG aur RAW file formats mein kya major difference hai?

options.A: RAW files uncompressed aur zyada editing flexibility dete hain, JPEG compressed aur kam flexible hote hain
options.B: JPEG files zyada bade hote hain RAW se
options.C: RAW files sirf black & white hote hain
options.D: JPEG files sirf video ke liye hain

questions.explanation: RAW files camera sensor se saari information store karte hain, jisse post-processing mein zyada control milta hai. JPEG processed aur compressed hote hain.

questions.question: Photo editing mein 'Contrast' adjust karne se kya hota hai?

options.A: Highlights aur shadows ke beech ka difference badhta ya kam hota hai
options.B: Image ka colour change hota hai

questions.explanation: Contrast adjustment se image ke brightest aur darkest parts ke beech ka difference change hota hai, jisse image mein 'pop' aata hai.

questions.question: Watermarking ka kya purpose hai professional photography mein?

options.A: Photo ki ownership claim karna aur unauthorized use se bachana
options.C: Photo ka file size kam karna

questions.explanation: Watermark ek visible sign (logo ya text) hota hai jo photo par lagaya jaata hai taaki ownership dikhe aur uska unauthorized use discourage ho.

questions.question: Ek client ke liye photos deliver karne se pehle, aap kya ensure karenge?

options.A: Photos ko professionally edit kiya gaya hai aur client ki requirements meet ho rahi hain
options.B: Photos ko raw format mein hi deliver karna
options.C: Photos ko compress karke quality kam karna
options.D: Photos ko bina watermark ke deliver karna

questions.explanation: Professional delivery mein photos ka high-quality, edited hona aur client ki specific needs ko fulfill karna essential hai.

questions.question: Photographic ethics mein 'Manipulation' ka kya concern hai?

options.A: Image ko itna edit karna ki uski reality ya integrity change ho jaaye

questions.explanation: Photographic ethics mein, excessive manipulation (jaise elements add/remove karna) ek concern hai, especially photojournalism mein, jahan image ki integrity important hai.

questions.question: Copyright ka kya matlab hai photography mein?

options.A: Photographer ko uske kaam par exclusive legal rights dena
options.B: Koi bhi photo ko free mein use kar sakta hai

questions.explanation: Copyright photographer ko uski photos par exclusive rights deta hai, jiska matlab hai ki koi aur uski permission ke bina use copy, distribute ya modify nahi kar sakta.

questions.question: Cloud storage solutions (jaise Google Drive, Dropbox) ka kya benefit hai photographers ke liye?

options.A: Photos ka secure backup aur easy access anywhere

questions.explanation: Cloud storage photos ka off-site backup provide karta hai aur internet connection ke saath kahin se bhi access provide karta hai, jo data loss se bachata hai.

questions.question: Ek freelance photographer ke liye, client communication mein kya important hai?

options.A: Client ki requirements ko clearly samajhna aur expectations manage karna
options.B: Sirf apni terms par kaam karna
options.C: Client se kabhi baat na karna
options.D: Bina agreement ke kaam shuru kar dena

questions.explanation: Clear client communication project ki success ke liye critical hai, jismein requirements samajhna, scope define karna aur expectations manage karna shamil hai.

questions.question: Photography mein 'Consent' ka kya mahatva hai?

options.A: People ki photos lene se pehle unki permission lena, especially private settings mein

questions.explanation: Ethics mein, kisi ki photo lene se pehle unki permission (consent) lena important hai, khaaskar jab privacy expect ki jaati ho, jaise private events ya portraits.

questions.question: Agar aap ek wedding photographer hain aur aapki hard drive crash ho jaati hai, toh data loss se bachne ke liye aapne kya kiya hona chahiye tha?

options.A: Regularly photos ka backup lena (external drive, cloud)
options.D: Hard drive ko kabhi off na karna

questions.explanation: Data loss se bachne ka sabse effective tareeka multiple backups rakhna hai, jaise external hard drives, cloud storage, ya NAS (Network Attached Storage).

questions.question: Ek photographer ke liye 'Portfolio' ka kya role hai?

options.A: Apne best kaam ko showcase karna aur clients ko attract karna
options.B: Apne saare photos ko store karna

questions.explanation: Portfolio ek collection hai aapke best work ka jo aapki skills aur style ko demonstrate karta hai, aur clients ko hire karne ke liye convince karta hai.

questions.question: Photo editing mein 'Saturation' adjust karne se kya hota hai?

options.A: Colours ki intensity ya vibrancy badhti ya kam hoti hai

questions.explanation: Saturation adjustment se colours kitne vivid ya muted dikhenge, yeh control hota hai.

questions.question: Professional photography mein 'Deliverables' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Woh final products (photos, albums, prints) jo client ko diye jaayenge

questions.explanation: Deliverables woh specific items ya services hote hain jo ek project ke end mein client ko provide kiye jaate hain, jaise edited photos, prints, ya albums.

questions.question: Agar aapko ek client ke liye photos website par upload karni hain, toh aap kis file format ko prefer karenge?

options.A: JPEG (optimized for web)

questions.explanation: Web ke liye JPEG files preferred hote hain kyunki woh compressed hote hain, jisse loading time kam hota hai, aur quality bhi acceptable rehti hai.

questions.question: Ek photographer ko apni pricing strategy set karte samay kya consider karna chahiye?

options.A: Apne expenses, experience, market rates aur client ki budget expectations
options.D: Pricing ka koi fixed rule nahi hota

questions.explanation: Pricing strategy mein apne expenses (gear, software, marketing), experience level, market mein chal rahe rates, aur client ki financial capacity sabko consider karna hota hai.
